name: SC-001: Add to cart updates counter instantly
objective: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/, enter 'standard_user' in the username field, enter 'secret_sauce' in the password field, click the Login button, click 'Add to cart' on the first product tile, and assert that the shopping cart badge in the top-right navigation shows the number 1.

name: SC-002: Cart page shows item names and prices
objective: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/, enter 'standard_user' in the username field, enter 'secret_sauce' in the password field, click the Login button, click 'Add to cart' on the first product tile, click the shopping cart icon in the top-right, and assert that the cart page shows a product name and a price in the cart item row.

name: SC-003: Remove item clears cart badge
objective: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/, enter 'standard_user' in the username field, enter 'secret_sauce' in the password field, click the Login button, click 'Add to cart' on the first product tile, click the 'Remove' button that appears on that same product tile, and assert that the shopping cart badge is no longer visible in the navigation.

name: SC-004: Sort by price shows cheapest product first
objective: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/, enter 'standard_user' in the username field, enter 'secret_sauce' in the password field, click the Login button, open the sort dropdown and select 'Price (low to high)', and assert that the first product tile on the page displays the price $7.99.

name: SC-005: Catalog displays product tiles with pricing
objective: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/, enter 'standard_user' in the username field, enter 'secret_sauce' in the password field, click the Login button, and assert that the inventory page displays at least four product tiles each showing a product name and a price.

name: SC-006: Product tile opens detail page with name, image, price
objective: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/, enter 'standard_user' in the username field, enter 'secret_sauce' in the password field, click the Login button, click the name or image of the first product tile, and assert that the product detail page displays the product name, at least one product image, and the product price.

name: SC-007: Sort by name organises products alphabetically
objective: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/, enter 'standard_user' in the username field, enter 'secret_sauce' in the password field, click the Login button, open the sort dropdown and select 'Name (A to Z)', and assert that the first product tile displays the name 'Sauce Labs Backpack'.

name: SC-008: Add to cart changes button to Remove
objective: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/, enter 'standard_user' in the username field, enter 'secret_sauce' in the password field, click the Login button, click 'Add to cart' on the first product tile, and assert that the button on that product tile now displays the text 'Remove'.
